_description: CS-RabbitMQ stack — UPSTREAM base images consumed via the Dockerfiles and the optional Traefik sidecar. The monitor tracks their digests and triggers a release when one moves. It MUST NOT track this repo's own published images (ghcr.io/bauer-group/cs-rabbitmq/*): doing so would loop — a release republishes them, their digest moves, the monitor fires again, forever.

images.name: python-alpine
images.description: Base image for the rabbitmq-init container (src/rabbitmq-init/Dockerfile)

images.name: traefik-certs-dumper
images.description: Optional sidecar that dumps Let's Encrypt certs for AMQPS (docker-compose.traefik.yml)
